title: Digital Assistant
subtitle: Recruit and manage AI agent instances running on CubeSandbox

preview.title: Digital Assistant Preview
preview.description: This feature is intended for demos and early validation. APIs, deployment options, and UX may change.

settings.title: Digital Assistant Settings
settings.description: Configure the default LLM service for OpenClaw assistants. The API key is encrypted in the database and, by default, injected by CubeEgress at outbound request time so it never enters the assistant sandbox.

baseUrl.label: LLM Base URL
baseUrl.hint: OpenAI-compatible API endpoint, e.g. https://api.deepseek.com or an internal gateway.

model.label: Model ID
model.hint: Default model injected into OpenClaw, e.g. deepseek/deepseek-v4-flash. For a custom upstream it is normalized to {Provider}/{ModelID}; the part after the slash is sent upstream as the real model name.

apiKey.label: LLM API Key
apiKey.hint: Bound to the current Provider / Base URL. The full key is never shown again after saving — only a masked preview.

credentialMode.label: Credential delivery
credentialMode.egressHint: When an assistant is created, CubeEgress injects the Authorization header only for this LLM Base URL. OpenClaw stores only a managed placeholder key.
credentialMode.envHint: Legacy mode writes the real API key into OpenClaw env/config. Use only when CubeEgress is unavailable.

gatewayDomain.label: Gateway domain
gatewayDomain.hint: Optional. When set, each assistant's gateway opens on its own subdomain (port-sandboxId.domain, e.g. cube.app), fully isolating WebSocket sessions and preventing crosstalk. Leave blank to keep using the same-origin proxy path. Requires wildcard DNS and a certificate for the domain.

settings.persistenceDisabled: No database configured, so the model service configuration cannot be saved. Set DATABASE_URL for CubeAPI and try again.

status.missing: No LLM API key configured yet — assistants cannot be created.

errors.required: Please enter or change at least one model service setting

onboarding.title: Get started with Digital Assistants
onboarding.description: Complete the steps below to create your first digital assistant.

apiKey.title: Configure the LLM service
apiKey.desc: Drives the LLM calls behind OpenClaw assistants. Provider / Base URL / Model / API Key are saved globally.

template.title: Prepare a 龙虾助手 template
template.desc: Install the lightweight or all-in-one 龙虾助手 image from the template market as the system template for new assistants.

teamPlaceholder.title: Team Shared · Coming soon
teamPlaceholder.description: Sharing, hand-off and collaboration between team members is on the roadmap.

templates.title: Assistant Templates
templates.description: View published assistant templates. They can be selected when creating a new assistant.
templates.emptyDescription: Publish an assistant template from the assistant state details to see it here.

prompts.rename: Enter a new assistant template name

prompts.pause: Once paused the assistant stops responding. You can Resume anytime. Pause now?

pending.incubatingHint: Spinning up a new assistant from template, a few seconds
pending.cloningHint: Creating an independent copy from a snapshot, a few seconds

state.title: State Management
state.description: Manage assistant state with Sandbox snapshots, restore, and create copy
state.cardSummary: {{count}} snapshots ({{healthy}} healthy). Open details for the timeline, restore, copies, and templates.
state.confirmRollback: Restore this digital assistant to the selected snapshot? Unsaved current state may be overwritten.

recover.hint: Restart the assistant; if still unhealthy, auto-roll back to the latest healthy snapshot
recover.resultRollback: Rolled back to the latest healthy snapshot and recovered.

dialogs.renameSnapshotDescription: Give this snapshot a recognizable name shown on the version timeline.

prompts.markHealthy: Mark this snapshot as healthy? Self-heal will prefer rolling back to healthy snapshots.
prompts.unmarkHealthy: Remove the healthy mark from this snapshot? It will no longer be a self-heal anchor.
prompts.recover: This will restart the assistant; if still unhealthy it auto-rolls back to the latest healthy snapshot, with a brief interruption. Continue?
prompts.clone: This creates {{count}} independent copies from the selected snapshot (a few seconds). Each copy is fully independent. Continue?
prompts.publish: Publish the selected snapshot as an assistant template for the team to reuse. Continue?

archives.title: Snapshot timeline
archives.description: Shows the assistant's version history as a timeline; select a snapshot to restore, copy, or publish.
archives.empty: No snapshots yet. Create one first.
archives.confirmDelete: Delete this snapshot? Snapshots referenced by assistant templates cannot be deleted.

dialog.title: Create Personal Assistant
dialog.namePlaceholder: Give your new assistant a name

openclaw.title: OpenClaw OSS
openclaw.description: Open-source OpenClaw, supports multi-task scheduling & tool integration

hermes.title: Hermes OSS
hermes.description: Open-source Hermes, autonomous planning & continuous evolution

dialog.templateHint: Choose a published digital assistant template, or keep the system default.
dialog.persistenceHint: Full Snapshot captures the whole Sandbox. File Sharing persists OpenClaw files on the host and snapshots/clones copy only that shared file state.
dialog.persistenceInheritedHint: A digital assistant template is selected, so the state mode is inherited from the template.

sharedFiles.title: File Sharing
sharedFiles.description: Mount OpenClaw files from the host, suitable for long-lived sessions, config, and managed credential state.

fullSnapshot.title: Full Snapshot
fullSnapshot.description: Do not use host mounts; snapshot and rollback submit the whole Sandbox rootfs.

dialog.modelHint: Uses the default model from Model Service Settings
dialog.botConfigHint: Paste Bot ID & Secret from the smart bot 'API config - long-connection' panel; when provided, AgentHub installs the WeCom plugin and binds the bot automatically

apiKeyRequired.title: LLM API key not configured
apiKeyRequired.description: Configure a valid LLM API key in “Model Service Settings” before creating a digital assistant.

errors.apiKeyRequired: Configure an LLM API key before creating an assistant

wecomDialog.title: WeCom Config
wecomDialog.description: View or update the WeCom Bot ID and Secret bound to this digital assistant.

errors.required: Please provide both Bot ID and Secret

modelDialog.title: Change Model
modelDialog.label: Model
modelDialog.help: How to use your own model
modelDialog.warning: Changing the default model restarts the Agent service automatically without data loss.
